subtitle.check.count_mismatch: Cue count mismatch: source {ref_count} vs target {tgt_count}
subtitle.check.length_too_long: Translation is {ratio}× the source length ({tgt_len}/{ref_len} chars) — possible repetition / verbosity
subtitle.check.length_too_short: Translation is only {pct}% of the source length ({tgt_len}/{ref_len} chars) — possible omission
subtitle.check.duplicate_run: {n}+ consecutive identical cues (model may be looping)
subtitle.check.lang_purity: Target language purity too low: {pct}% of chars are {lang} (expected ≥ {floor}%)
